title: Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises:
Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital International Enterprises!
